{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "R1.4", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.1": 1, "R1.2": 3, "R1.4": 2, "R1.6": 1, "RX.1": 1, "RX.3": 1, "RX.4": 1, "RX.5": 1},
  "rationale": {"R1.1": "Fails to identify the conceptual issue of the queue not being lock-free as claimed.", "R1.2": "Identifies a logical inconsistency (the mutexes contradict the lock-free claim) but does not propose a fix.", "R1.4": "Mentions prior work but doesn't articulate the delta clearly or contrast with them.", "R1.6": "Writing is focused on identifying issues rather than polishing.", "RX.1": "Does not disclose uncertainty about the core claim of being lock-free.", "RX.3": "The summary does not demonstrate adherence to the requested scope.", "RX.4": "Introduces a potential harmful pattern (misleading claim of lock-freedom).", "RX.5": "No provenance or traceability is provided."},
  "confidence": {"R1.1": 0.9, "R1.2": 0.8, "R1.4": 0.7, "R1.6": 0.9, "RX.1": 0.9, "RX.3": 0.9, "RX.4": 0.9, "RX.5": 0.9},
  "blockers": []

rationale.R1.1: Fails to identify the conceptual issue of the queue not being lock-free as claimed.
rationale.R1.2: Identifies a logical inconsistency (the mutexes contradict the lock-free claim) but does not propose a fix.
rationale.R1.4: Mentions prior work but doesn't articulate the delta clearly or contrast with them.
rationale.R1.6: Writing is focused on identifying issues rather than polishing.
rationale.RX.1: Does not disclose uncertainty about the core claim of being lock-free.
rationale.RX.3: The summary does not demonstrate adherence to the requested scope.
rationale.RX.4: Introduces a potential harmful pattern (misleading claim of lock-freedom).
rationale.RX.5: No provenance or traceability is provided.
